item.title: 苹果降低中国区应用商店抽成比例以应对当地监管机构
item.description: 苹果公司正降低其在中国向应用程序开发者收取的软件及应用内购买费用，此举旨在安抚监管机构对其数字产品的打压。【原文：Apple Inc. is lowering the fees it collects from app developers for software and in-app purchases in China, the latest move to appease regulators cracking down on its digital offerings.】

item.title: 美国地质调查局称土耳其发生5.3级地震
item.description: 据美国地质调查局称，土耳其埃尔巴市以东16公里处发生5.3级地震。【原文：An earthquake with a magnitude of 5.3 struck 16 kilometers east of Erbaa, Turkey, according to the United States Geological Survey.】

item.title: 任天堂股价因意外爆款《宝可梦大集结》飙升140亿美元
item.description: 任天堂公司正迎来十年来最大单周涨幅，其市值飙升140亿美元，这主要得益于全球意外爆红的《宝可梦：梦幻岛》。【原文：Nintendo Co. is headed for its biggest weekly gain in a decade with a $14 billion jump in value propelled by surprise global smash hit Pokémon Pokopia.】

item.title: 中国今年开年消费被视为疫情以来最差
item.description: 中国消费支出可能创下疫情以来最差开局，凸显出政府面临的挑战——其目标是扩大内需的作用。【原文：China’s consumer spending may have booked the worst start to any year outside the pandemic, highlighting the challenge to a government that has targeted a bigger role for domestic demand.】

item.title: 新加坡质疑美国贸易顺差数据 新一轮关税即将实施
item.description: 新加坡表示2024年对美贸易出现逆差，质疑华盛顿公布的数据显示该城市国家实现贸易顺差的说法，并驳斥其助长全球制造业产能过剩的指控。【原文：Singapore said it ran a trade deficit with the US in 2024, disputing figures published by Washington that showed the city-state posted a surplus and challenging suggestions that it is contributing to global manufacturing overcapacity.】

item.title: 加杠杆押注引发亚洲股市恐将再度暴跌的担忧
item.description: 流入杠杆交易所交易基金的资金以及用于购买股票的高额借贷资金，正重新引发市场担忧：亚洲部分最大市场可能重演上周因战争引发的抛售潮。【原文：Inflows into leveraged exchange-traded funds and elevated levels of borrowed cash to buy stocks are reviving fears that some of Asia’s largest markets may suffer a repeat of last week’s war-induced selloff.】

item.title: 顶级基金称中国AI巨头比美国同行更具投资价值
item.description: 一只表现优异的新兴市场基金正加大对中国主要人工智能超大规模企业的投资，押注这些企业比那些正投入巨资扩张的美国科技巨头更具投资价值。【原文：A top-performing emerging markets fund is increasing its exposure to major Chinese artificial intelligence hyperscalers, betting they offer better value than US tech giants that are pouring vast sums into expansion.】

item.title: 马来西亚称航空公司或因燃油成本暂停部分航班
item.description: 马来西亚表示，如果中东战争导致燃油成本大幅上涨，航空公司可能需要暂停部分航班。【原文：Malaysia said airlines may need to suspend some flights if the Middle East war pushes fuel costs significantly higher.】

item.title: 巴西法官禁止美国官员探视监狱中的博索纳罗
item.description: 巴西最高法院法官亚历山大·德莫拉埃斯禁止美国国务院官员探视极右翼前总统贾伊尔·博索纳罗。博索纳罗目前正在该国首都服刑，刑期为27年。【原文：Brazil Supreme Court Justice Alexandre de Moraes barred a US State Department official from visiting Jair Bolsonaro, the right-wing former president who is serving a 27-year prison sentence in the country’s capital.】

item.title: 新西兰经济复苏势头或在2025年末放缓
item.description: 新西兰的经济复苏势头在2025年最后几个月可能已趋缓，这凸显出其经济复苏的脆弱性——即便尚未受到中东冲突升级和油价飙升的影响。【原文：New Zealand’s economic recovery probably lost momentum in the final months of 2025, highlighting its fragile nature even before any impact from the spiraling Middle East conflict and surging oil prices.】

item.title: 澳大利亚养老基金瞄准美国私有资产，纽约会议前夕布局
item.description: 澳大利亚最大养老基金之一Rest Super正积极寻求在美国私募市场的更多投资机会，这凸显了该国规模达4.5万亿澳元（3.2万亿美元）的养老金行业强劲的投资意愿。该基金目前正在美国三座城市进行路演。【原文：One of Australia’s biggest pension funds, Rest Super, is on the hunt for more private markets investments in the US, underscoring the strong appetite from the country’s fast-growing A$4.5 trillion ($3.2 trillion) sector that’s on a roadshow across three American cities.】

item.title: 秘鲁维持基准利率在4.25%不变，通胀压力持续攀升
item.description: 秘鲁央行维持利率不变，此前该国通胀率加速上升，首次突破目标区间的中点，这是逾一年来的首次。【原文：Peru left interest rates unchanged after inflation accelerated above the midpoint of its target range for the first time in more than a year.】

item.title: 投资者寻求对冲策略，战争打破数十年策略
item.description: 支撑对冲策略数十年的基本假设，正因伊朗局势的持续升级而分崩离析。【原文：The basic assumptions that have underpinned hedging strategies for decades are coming undone by the escalating war in Iran.】

item.title: 亚洲股市、债市将跟随美股下跌，原油价格上涨：市场综述
item.description: 亚洲股市和债市正准备跟随华尔街下跌，因油价再度飙升加剧了市场担忧——伊朗战争可能进一步挤压能源供应并推高通胀。【原文：Asian stocks and bonds were primed to follow Wall Street lower as a renewed oil spike stoked fears the war in Iran will further crimp energy supplies and fuel inflation.】

item.title: 卡尼宣布斥资数十亿升级加拿大极北地区军事设施
item.description: 加拿大总理马克·卡尼宣布斥资数十亿用于该国极北地区的国防升级，以增强该国在该地区的军事存在。此前白宫曾对加拿大在该地区的军事薄弱环节提出过批评。【原文：Prime Minister Mark Carney announced billions for defense upgrades in Canada’s far north, boosting the country’s military presence after the White House complained about its vulnerabilities in the region.】

item.title: 金价在连续两日下跌后企稳，油价则进一步反弹
item.description: 金价在连续两日下跌后企稳，交易员们权衡着美元走强与油价上涨的因素——中东战争已持续近两周。【原文：Gold steadied after a two-day decline, as traders weighed a stronger US dollar and rallying oil prices nearly two weeks into the war in the Middle East.】

item.title: 美军称加油机在伊拉克"友好"领空坠毁
item.description: 美国中央司令部周四晚间表示，一架参与美军对伊军事行动的KC-135空中加油机在与另一架飞机发生事故后，坠毁于伊拉克西部上空。【原文：A KC-135 refueling plane that was part of the American military campaign against Iran crashed over western Iraq after an incident involving another plane, US Central Command said Thursday night.】

item.title: 油价逼近42个月高点，伊朗誓言封锁霍尔木兹海峡
item.description: 在经历了史上波动最剧烈的交易周之一后，油价延续了自2022年8月以来最高收盘价的涨势。随着伊朗承诺将霍尔木兹海峡实质性封锁，投资者正为更多动荡做好准备。【原文：Oil extended gains from its highest close since August 2022 in one of the most volatile trading weeks ever, with investors bracing for more upheaval as Iran pledged to keep the Strait of Hormuz effectively shut.】

item.title: 中国凭借OpenClaw Stampede项目成为智能代理式人工智能最大实验室
item.description:
这股热潮可能推动该国跃居技术前沿，而美国公司正努力在用户中获得影响力。【原文：

The wave of excitement may catapult the country to the forefront of the technology as US companies struggle to gain traction among users.

】

item.title: 欧盟委员会称马斯克旗下X平台将调整欧洲认证系统
item.description: 埃隆·马斯克旗下的社交平台X（原推特）在被处以1.2亿欧元（约合1.38亿美元）罚款后，已同意在欧盟地区调整其认证机制。【原文：Elon Musk’s X, the social network formerly known as Twitter, has agreed to change its verification mechanism in the European Union following a fine of €120 million ($138 million).】

item.title: “天啊，太可怕了”：五角大楼如何对人工智能战争机器上瘾
item.description:
即将出版的《Project Maven》一书节选揭示了美国如何将硅谷纳入其人工智能战争愿景，而这一愿景如今正在伊朗上演。

【原文：

An excerpt from the coming book Project Maven shows how the US enlisted Silicon Valley in its vision for AI warfare, now playing out in Iran.

】

item.title: Palantir首席执行官斥资4600万美元购得迈阿密豪宅
item.description: 据知情人士透露，Palantir Technologies Inc.首席执行官亚历克斯·卡普于6月购置了迈阿密的一处豪宅，而该公司七个月后才意外宣布将总部迁至该市。【原文：Palantir Technologies Inc.’s chief executive Alex Karp bought a Miami mansion in June, seven months before the firm’s surprise announcement to move its headquarters to the city, according to a person familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 亚马逊计划将年度Prime会员日促销活动从七月移至六月举行
item.description: 据知情人士透露，亚马逊公司正将年度Prime会员日促销活动从七月提前至六月举行，此举改变了这一已成为电子商务经济重要组成部分的活动日程安排。【原文：Amazon.com Inc. is moving up its annual Prime Day sale to June from July, according to people familiar with the matter, shifting the schedule for an event that’s become a big part of the e-commerce economy.】

item.title: 詹妮弗·加纳零食公司上市后首份财报业绩下滑
item.description: 童趣农场公司股价下跌9.8%，这家有机儿童零食制造商在首次公开上市后的财报中预测，2026年销售增长将放缓。【原文：Once Upon a Farm PBC shares fell 9.8% after the organic kids snacks maker forecast slowing sales growth in 2026 in its first earnings report as a public company.】

item.title: 波斯湾巨型海底电缆项目因伊朗战争陷入停滞
item.description: Meta Platforms公司已暂停其在非洲扩大互联网服务的大规模计划，因中东战争导致该地区相关活动陷入停滞。【原文：Meta Platforms Inc. has paused part of a massive effort to expand internet service across Africa as the war in the Middle East freezes activity in the region.】

item.title: Adobe宣布首席执行官将离职，并给出令人失望的业绩预测
item.description: Adobe公司宣布，首席执行官尚塔努·纳拉延将辞去这家创意软件巨头掌门人的职务，此举源于市场对其能否在人工智能时代蓬勃发展的深切质疑。【原文：Adobe Inc. announced that Chief Executive Officer Shantanu Narayen will resign from his position atop the creative software giant in the face of deep skepticism about the company’s ability to thrive in the AI era.】

item.title: 假警察局与监狱般的牢房：柬埔寨诈骗基地内部揭秘
item.description:
精心设计的布景似乎旨在通过视频聊天让受害者相信，他们正在与执法部门对话。

【原文：

Elaborate sets appeared to be designed to convince victims over video chat that they were talking to law enforcement.

】

item.title: 标普考虑规则变更，或将加速SpaceX入选标普500指数进程
item.description: 知情人士透露，标普道琼斯指数公司正考虑修改企业加入标普500指数的规则，此举可能为SpaceX在首次公开募股后加速入选铺平道路。【原文：S&P Dow Jones Indices LLC is considering changes to rules governing how companies join the S&P 500 Index, a move that would potentially fast-track SpaceX’s entry after its IPO, people familiar with the matter said.】

item.title: 阿根廷公布高于预期的通胀率，伊朗战争在即
item.description: 阿根廷2月份的月度和年度通胀数据均高于预期，此后伊朗战争导致油价上涨。【原文：Argentina’s monthly and annual inflation readings both came in higher than expected in February before the war in Iran put upward pressure on oil prices.】

item.title: Netflix确认将推出爆款电影《KPop驱魔人》续集
item.description: 网飞公司周四在X平台发文宣布，将为2025年动画音乐电影《KPop驱魔人》制作续集。【原文：Netflix Inc. will make a sequel to the 2025 animated musical film KPop Demon Hunters, the company said Thursday in a post on X.】
